name: Pancake Rolls
recipeIngredient: 1 small bunch spring onions, finely chopped
1 piece fresh ginger, peeled and crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a wok or frying pan. Stir-fry the onions, garlic, and ginger for a few minutes.
2. Add beansprouts and celery, stir-fry for an additional 2 minutes.
3. Remove vegetables from the pan and add prawns. Mix with soy sauce, sugar, and season to taste. Allow to cool.
4. Divide the cooled filling into 12 portions.
5. Cut each sheet of fillo pastry in half crosswise.
6. Place a portion of filling at one end of a pastry square.
7. Roll up the pastry just enough to enclose the filling, then fold in the ends and seal with water.
8. Continue rolling and again seal with water.
9. Deep fry at 350°F (180°C) for about 5 minutes.
10. Drain well and serve.
